raw_resume_text:
JACOB ZOCHOWSKI
Email: jakez6396@gmail.com Phone: (207) 891-0111
OPERATIONS & LOGISTICS LEADER Warehouse | Transportation | Distribution | E-Commerce Operations
High impact operations leader with progressive experience managing large scale warehouse and transportation teams within a fast-paced logistics environment. Proven ability to scale operations, reduce costs, drive labor efficiency and improve service execution, while maintaining strong safety and compliance standards. Recognized for building accountable teams, solving operational challenges, and improving processes that directly impact profitability and customer satisfaction.
CORE EXPERTISE Operations Leadership | Warehouse Management | Transportation and Routing | Labor Optimization | WMS and Inventory Control | Safety and Compliance | Process Improvement | Operational Auditing | Team Development | E-Commerce Fulfillment | Cross Functional Collaboration

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Assistant Warehouse Manager January 2025 - Present
Energy Products, Inc. - Madison Heights, MI
Full-cycle recruitment of Warehouse Associates, including applicant screening, interviewing, and extending offers, while also training new hires on operational duties and OSHA/workplace-safety practices and monitoring ongoing adherence to required work standards
Served as primary operational leader across warehouse functions, coordinating cross-department workflows and following up on execution
Perform weekly cycle counts, investigate variance reports, and report discrepancies
E-Commerce: Restored Amazon account health from high-risk deactivation to compliant, led workflow improvements and tightening order processing from inception, booking, delivery, and customer service (ODR%, LSR%); Identified aged product across locations and converted stagnant product into active sales; Redesigned warehouse layout increasing storage capacity and improving picking efficiency; Managed product listings on Amazon Seller Central and eBay; Supervised shipping associates ensuring daily order accuracy and on-time shipments; Managed inventory levels preventing stock outs and overselling; Handled customer inquiries, returns, delivery claims, and refunds; Coordinated pallet quantity orders with commercial customers; Assessed delivery site infrastructure prior to dispatch; Analyzed sales performance and shipping templates to increase margins
Scheduled LTL pickups and coordinated with brokers for FTL quotes and pickups
Managed scrap battery coordination and international BOL documentation
Ordered and maintained warehouse operational supplies and PPE
Coordinated installation of golf cart parts and batteries
Used WMS for invoicing, inventory adjustments, orders, returns, credits, rebills, and COD processing
Performed accuracy checks on every order
Determined and communicated driver routes reducing cost per mile and improving delivery times
Employee of the Quarter Nominee within six months of employment

HUB Operations Manager June 2023 - January 2025
Central Transport - Detroit, MI
Oversaw inbound/outbound freight movement for KPI adherence
Managed highest-volume Next-Day Hub (~1,100 nightly skids)
Managed seven exempt employees with training, development, and performance support
Closing and Opening Manager for 183-door terminal with 80+ drivers and 12+ dock workers
Drove network efficiency through on-time freight movement, delay resolution, cost control, labor management, and safety compliance
Engaged stakeholders from executive to operational levels ensuring consistent communication
Trained Management Trainee graduates
Coordinated terminal shutdowns to reduce theft
Ensured proper loading through auditing and training

Next-Day HUB Supervisor August 2022 - June 2023
Central Transport - Detroit, MI
Improved terminal operations and safety compliance through audit refinement and communication
Assisted outbound operations and route planning
Audited freight loaders ensuring damage-free shipments
Assisted inbound routing for city operations
Planned regional routes in accordance with DOT standards
Reviewed weekly updates with hourly staff
Used counseling, training, and documentation for performance management
Coordinated tractor swaps and equipment relocation

Line Haul Supervisor October 2020 - August 2022
Central Transport - Warren, MI
Managed up to twenty exempt dispatch team members
Maintained DOT/FMCSA/OSHA compliance
Tracked data for performance evaluation and operational improvement
Audited freight loaders for shipment integrity
Traveled to support locations for training
Booked hotels for laydowns
Coordinated breakdown response and driver recoveries
Pulled nightly data and reported discrepancies to directors

Dispatch Supervisor September 2019 - October 2020
Central Transport - Warren, MI
Planned and dispatched drivers across US/Canada
Oversaw up to 150 drivers ensuring DOT compliance
Scheduled workforce ensuring route coverage
Adjusted routes for weather and operational disruptions
Communicated breakdowns and routing changes

EDUCATION
Eastern Michigan University
Bachelor of Business Administration
Logistics & Supply Chain Management
Henry Ford College
Associates in Supply Chain Management

structured_resume.name: Jacob Zochowski
structured_resume.summary: High impact operations leader with progressive experience managing large scale warehouse and transportation teams within a fast-paced logistics environment. Proven ability to scale operations, reduce costs, drive labor efficiency and improve service execution, while maintaining strong safety and compliance standards.

responsibilities: Led warehouse operations and cross-department coordination
Managed recruitment and training of warehouse associates
Oversaw cycle counts and variance investigations
Led e-commerce operations including Amazon and eBay management
Supervised shipping associates and order fulfillment
Coordinated commercial pallet orders and logistics
Optimized warehouse layout and storage capacity
Analyzed sales performance and margin improvements
Managed freight scheduling and broker coordination
Maintained compliance documentation and international shipping records
Used WMS for invoicing, inventory control, and transaction processing
Managed inbound and outbound freight operations
Improved network efficiency and cost control
Improved terminal operations and safety compliance
